nasb.text: Someone in the crowd said to Him, “Teacher, tell my brother to divide the family inheritance with me.”

esv.text: Someone in the crowd said to him, “Teacher, tell my brother to divide the inheritance with me.”

cnv.text: 群眾中有一個人對耶穌說：“老師，請吩咐我的兄弟和我分家業。”

ccb.text: 这时，人群中有人对耶稣说：“老师，请你劝劝我的兄长跟我分家产吧。”

csbs.text: 人群中有一个人对耶稣说：“老师，请吩咐我的哥哥与我分继业吧！”
